TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pemeco hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 24,709,000 sq km (maki' tay 4ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 565,720,588. qalang Anguilla Antigua and Barbuda Aruba (Kingdom of the Netherlands) The Bahamas Barbados Belize Bermuda Bonaire (Kingdom of the Netherlands) British Virgin Islands Canada Cayman Islands Clipperton Island (France) Costa Rica Cuba Curaçao (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Dominica Dominican Republic El Salvador Federal Dependencies of Venezuela (Venezuela) Greenland Grenada Guadeloupe (France) Guatemala Haiti Honduras Jamaica Martinique (France) Mexico Montserrat Nicaragua Nueva Esparta (Venezuela) Panama Puerto Rico Saba (Kingdom of the Netherlands) San Andrés and Providencia (Colombia) Saint Barthélemy (France) Saint Kitts and Nevis Saint Lucia Saint Martin (France) Saint Pierre and Miquelon (France) Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Sint Eustatius (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Sint Maarten (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Trinidad and Tobago Turks and Caicos Islands United States United States Virgin Islands cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 北美洲 - 翰林雲端學院
S.PHON: pemeʦ~ʨo ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕjuw na ħijal. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***,***. qalaŋ aŋuilla antiɣua an* βarβu*a aruβa (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) tħe βaħamas~ɕ βarβa*os~ɕ βelize βermu*a βonaire (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) βritis~ɕħ *irɣin is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨana*a ʦ~ʨajman is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨlipperton is~ɕlan* (*ranʦ~ʨe) ʦ~ʨos~ɕta riʦ~ʨa ʦ~ʨuβa ʦ~ʨura*ao (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) *ominiʦ~ʨa *ominiʦ~ʨan repuβliʦ~ʨ el s~ɕal*a*or *e*eral *epen*enʦ~ʨies~ɕ o* *enezuela (*enezuela) ɣreenlan* ɣrena*a ɣua*eloupe (*ranʦ~ʨe) ɣuatemala ħaiti ħon*uras~ɕ *amaiʦ~ʨa martinique (*ranʦ~ʨe) mexiʦ~ʨo monts~ɕerrat niʦ~ʨaraɣua nue*a es~ɕparta (*enezuela) panama puerto riʦ~ʨo s~ɕaβa (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) s~ɕan an*r*s~ɕ an* pro*i*enʦ~ʨia (ʦ~ʨolomβia) s~ɕaint βartħ*lemj (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint kitts~ɕ an* ne*is~ɕ s~ɕaint luʦ~ʨia s~ɕaint martin (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint pierre an* miquelon (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint *inʦ~ʨent an* tħe ɣrena*ines~ɕ s~ɕint eus~ɕtatius~ɕ (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) s~ɕint maarten (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) trini*a* an* toβaɣo turks~ɕ an* ʦ~ʨaiʦ~ʨos~ɕ is~ɕlan*s~ɕ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ *irɣin is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *** - ******
S.FORM: Pemeco hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 24,709,000 sq km (maki' tay 4ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 565,720,588. qalang Anguilla Antigua and Barbuda Aruba (Kingdom of the Netherlands) The Bahamas Barbados Belize Bermuda Bonaire (Kingdom of the Netherlands) British Virgin Islands Canada Cayman Islands Clipperton Island (France) Costa Rica Cuba Curaçao (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Dominica Dominican Republic El Salvador Federal Dependencies of Venezuela (Venezuela) Greenland Grenada Guadeloupe (France) Guatemala Haiti Honduras Jamaica Martinique (France) Mexico Montserrat Nicaragua Nueva Esparta (Venezuela) Panama Puerto Rico Saba (Kingdom of the Netherlands) San Andrés and Providencia (Colombia) Saint Barthélemy (France) Saint Kitts and Nevis Saint Lucia Saint Martin (France) Saint Pierre and Miquelon (France) Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Sint Eustatius (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Sint Maarten (Kingdom of the Netherlands) Trinidad and Tobago Turks and Caicos Islands United States United States Virgin Islands cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 北美洲 - 翰林雲端學院
S.PHON: pemeʦ~ʨo ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕjuw na ħijal. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa ***,***,***. qalaŋ aŋuilla antiɣua an* βarβu*a aruβa (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) tħe βaħamas~ɕ βarβa*os~ɕ βelize βermu*a βonaire (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) βritis~ɕħ *irɣin is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨana*a ʦ~ʨajman is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨlipperton is~ɕlan* (*ranʦ~ʨe) ʦ~ʨos~ɕta riʦ~ʨa ʦ~ʨuβa ʦ~ʨura*ao (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) *ominiʦ~ʨa *ominiʦ~ʨan repuβliʦ~ʨ el s~ɕal*a*or *e*eral *epen*enʦ~ʨies~ɕ o* *enezuela (*enezuela) ɣreenlan* ɣrena*a ɣua*eloupe (*ranʦ~ʨe) ɣuatemala ħaiti ħon*uras~ɕ *amaiʦ~ʨa martinique (*ranʦ~ʨe) mexiʦ~ʨo monts~ɕerrat niʦ~ʨaraɣua nue*a es~ɕparta (*enezuela) panama puerto riʦ~ʨo s~ɕaβa (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) s~ɕan an*r*s~ɕ an* pro*i*enʦ~ʨia (ʦ~ʨolomβia) s~ɕaint βartħ*lemj (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint kitts~ɕ an* ne*is~ɕ s~ɕaint luʦ~ʨia s~ɕaint martin (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint pierre an* miquelon (*ranʦ~ʨe) s~ɕaint *inʦ~ʨent an* tħe ɣrena*ines~ɕ s~ɕint eus~ɕtatius~ɕ (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) s~ɕint maarten (kiŋ*om o* tħe netħerlan*s~ɕ) trini*a* an* toβaɣo turks~ɕ an* ʦ~ʨaiʦ~ʨos~ɕ is~ɕlan*s~ɕ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ *irɣin is~ɕlan*s~ɕ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *** - ******
